description: Admin Panel Excellence - Enhance dashboard with real-time metric cards + line/bar charts. Upgrade user management with search/filter/bulk-actions/role-assignment table. Upgrade feature flags with percentage rollouts + targeting rules. Add audit log page with filterable activity log + pagination.
steps: 1. Enhance apps/admin/src/app/page.tsx dashboard: Add animated metric cards with sparkline mini-charts (using SVG path), trend indicators with colored arrows, auto-refresh every 30s with smooth number transitions, system health status bar (CPU/Memory/Disk as progress bars).

2. Enhance apps/admin/src/app/users/page.tsx: Add search input with debounce, filter dropdowns (role, status), sortable table columns (click header to sort), bulk select with checkbox column, bulk action buttons (suspend/activate/change-role/delete), role assignment dropdown in each row, pagination controls (prev/next/page-size selector).

3. Enhance apps/admin/src/app/feature-flags/page.tsx: Add percentage rollout slider with live preview, targeting rules builder (key/operator/value rows with add/remove), variant management (A/B variants with traffic split), flag history timeline showing who changed what when, search/filter flags.

4. Create apps/admin/src/app/audit/page.tsx (enhance existing if present): Filterable activity log showing user actions across the ecosystem, columns (timestamp/user/action/target/details), filter by action type, user, date range, auto-pagination with 'Load more' pattern, expandable row for full JSON details.
5. Add apps/admin/src/components/MetricCard.tsx, apps/admin/src/components/SparklineChart.tsx, apps/admin/src/components/DataTable.tsx reusable components for the admin panel.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard shows animated metric cards with sparklines and system health bars
Feature flags page has percentage slider, targeting rules builder, and variant management
Audit log page shows filterable activity with pagination
TypeScript compiles without errors for all admin changes
